The 78th Awards took place amid the 2026 Writers Guild Staff Union Strike.
On March 1, the Los Angeles ceremony was cancelled after the WGSU refused to ratify the WGAW's last best and final offer by February 27.
On February 28, the day after the Guild promised to cancel the Awards, they had still not publicly announced a cancellation.
LIVE and be hosted by comedian and WGAW member Atsuko Okatsuka.
After the awards show cancellation, Okatsuka announced on March 6 that she would be headlining a Benefit Comedy Show for the striking workers instead.
